H3600.derivation: a form for H3564 (כּוּר) (only in the dual);
H3600.strongs_def: a cooking range (consisting of two parallel stones, across which the boiler is set)

H3601.strongs_def: literally a director, i.e. the spindle or shank of adistaff, by which it is twirled

H3602.strongs_def: just so, referring to the previous or following context
H3602.kjv_def: after that (this) manner, this matter, (even) so, in such a case, thus.

H3603.strongs_def: a circle, i.e. (by implication) a circumjacent tract or region, especially the Ghor or valley of the Jordan; also a (round) loaf; also a talent (or large [round] coin)
H3603.usage: talent(48x), plain(12x), loaf(4x), piece(2x), country(1x), morsel(1x)

H3605.strongs_def: properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)
H3605.kjv_def: (in) all (manner, (ye)), altogether, any (manner), enough, every (one, place, thing), howsoever, as many as, (no-) thing, ought, whatsoever, (the) whole, whoso(-ever).

H3606.strongs_def: {properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense)}
H3606.kjv_def: all, any, + (forasmuch) as, + be-(for this) cause, every, + no (manner, -ne), + there (where) -fore, + though, what (where, who) -soever, (the) whole.
H3606.usage: all(51x), any(8x), whole(6x), as(4x), every(4x), no(2x)

H3607.strongs_def: to restrict, by act (hold back or in) or word (prohibit)
H3607.kjv_def: finish, forbid, keep (back), refrain, restrain, retain, shut up, be stayed, withhold.
H3607.usage: stayed(3x), refrained(2x), restrained(2x), withhold(2x), finish(1x), forbid(1x), kept(1x), retain(1x)

H3609.derivation: apparently from H3607 (כָּלָא) and H1 (אָב); restraint of (his) father;

H3610.derivation: dual of H3608 (כֶּלֶא) in the original sense of separation;

H3611.derivation: from an unused root means. to yelp, or else to attack;
H3611.strongs_def: a dog; hence (by euphemism) a male prostitute

H3612.derivation: perhaps a form of H3611 (כֶּלֶב), or else from the same root in the sense of forcible;
H3612.strongs_def: Caleb, the name of three Israelites

H3613.strongs_def: Caleb-Ephrathah, a place in Egypt (if the text is correct)

H3614.derivation: probably by erroneous transcription for כָּלֵבִי; patronymically from H3612 (כָּלֵב);
H3614.strongs_def: a Calebite or descendant of Caleb

H3615.strongs_def: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
H3615.kjv_def: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] have, leave (off), long, bring to pass, wholly reap, make clean riddance, spend, quite take away, waste.
H3615.usage: consume(57x), end(44x), finish(20x), fail(18x), accomplish(12x), done(9x), spend(8x), ended(7x), determined(4x), away(3x), fulfil(3x), fainteth(2x), destroy(2x), left(2x), waste(2x)

H3617.strongs_def: a completion; adverb, completely; also destruction
H3617.kjv_def: altogether, (be, utterly) consume(-d), consummation(-ption), was determined, (full, utter) end, riddance.
H3617.usage: altogether(3x), consume(3x), consumption(2x), consummation(1x), determined(1x), riddance(1x)

H3618.strongs_def: a bride (as if perfect); hence, a son's wife

H3619.strongs_def: a bird-trap (as furnished with a clap-stick or treadle to spring it); hence, a basket (as resembling a wicker cage)

H3620.derivation: the same as H3619 (כְּלוּב)xlit kᵉlûb corrected to kᵉlûwb;
H3620.strongs_def: Kelub, the name of two Israelites

H3623.derivation: denominative passive participle from H3618 (כַּלָּה)lemma כַּלָה missing dagesh, corrected to כַּלָּה;

H3624.derivation: from an unused root meaning to be complete;

H3626.derivation: from H3605 (כֹּל) and H2374 (חֹזֶה); every seer;

H3627.strongs_def: something prepared, i.e. any apparatus (as an implement, utensil, dress, vessel or weapon)
H3627.kjv_def: armour(-bearer), artillery, bag, carriage, [phrase] furnish, furniture, instrument, jewel, that is made of, [idiom] one from another, that which pertaineth, pot, [phrase] psaltery, sack, stuff, thing, tool, vessel, ware, weapon, [phrase] whatsoever.
H3627.usage: vessel(166x), instrument(39x), weapon(21x), jewel(21x), stuff(14x), thing(11x), armour(10x), furniture(7x), carriage(3x), bag(2x)

H3629.derivation: feminine of H3627 (כְּלִי) (only in the plural);
H3629.strongs_def: a kidney (as an essential organ); figuratively, the mind (as the interior self)

H3632.strongs_def: complete; as noun, the whole (specifically, a sacrifice entirely consumed); as adverb, fully
H3632.kjv_def: all, every whit, flame, perfect(-ion), utterly, whole burnt offering (sacrifice), wholly.
H3632.usage: perfect(3x), wholly(3x), all(2x), flame(1x), perfection(1x), utterly(1x), whole(1x)

H3637.strongs_def: properly, to wound; but only figuratively, to taunt or insult
H3637.kjv_def: be (make) ashamed, blush, be confounded, be put to confusion, hurt, reproach, (do, put to) shame.
H3637.usage: ashamed(12x), confounded(11x), shame(7x), blush(3x), hurt(2x), reproach(2x), confusion(1x)

H3638.strongs_def: Kilmad, a place apparently in the Assyrian empire

H3641.derivation: or כַּלְנֵה; also כַּלְנוֹ; of foreign derivation;
H3641.strongs_def: Calneh or Calno, a place in the Assyrian empire

H3643.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3644.strongs_def: a form of the prefix 'k-', but used separately  as, thus, so
H3644.kjv_def: according to, (such) as (it were, well as), in comparison of, like (as, to, unto), thus, when, worth.

H3645.derivation: or (Jeremiah 48:7) כְּמִישׁ; from an unused root meaning to subdue; the powerful;
H3645.strongs_def: Kemosh, the god of the Moabites
H3645.pos: proper noun with reference to deity

H3646.derivation: from an unused root meaning to store up or preserve;

H3647.strongs_def: to store away, i.e. (figuratively) in the memory

H3648.strongs_def: properly, to intertwine or contract, i.e. (by implication) to shrivel (as with heat); figuratively, to be deeply affected with passion (love or pity)

H3649.strongs_def: properly, an ascetic (as if shrunk with self-maceration), i.e. an idolatrous priest (only in plural)

H3650.strongs_def: obscuration (as if from shrinkage of light, i.e. an eclipse (only in plural)

H3651.strongs_def: properly, set upright; hence (figuratively as adjective) just; but usually (as adverb or conjunction) rightly or so (in various applications to manner, time and relation; often with other particles)
H3651.kjv_def: [phrase] after that (this, -ward, -wards), as... as, [phrase] (for-) asmuch as yet, [phrase] be (for which) cause, [phrase] following, howbeit, in (the) like (manner, -wise), [idiom] the more, right, (even) so, state, straightway, such (thing), surely, [phrase] there (where) -fore, this, thus, true, well, [idiom] you.

H3653.derivation: the same as H3651 (כֵּן), used as a noun;
H3653.strongs_def: a stand, i.e. pedestal or station
H3653.kjv_def: base, estate, foot, office, place, well.
H3653.usage: foot(8x), estate(4x), base(2x), office(1x), place(1x), well(1x)

H3654.derivation: from H3661 (כָּנַן) in the sense of fastening; (from infixing its sting; used only in plural (and irregular in Exodus 8:17,18; Hebrews 13:14))

H3655.strongs_def: to address by an additional name; hence, to eulogize

H3658.derivation: from a unused root meaning to twang;

H3663.derivation: or כְּנַנְיָהוּ; from H3661 (כָּנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has planted;

H3665.strongs_def: properly, to bend the knee; hence, to humiliate, vanquish
H3665.kjv_def: bring down (low), into subjection, under, humble (self), subdue.

H3666.derivation: from H3665 (כָּנַע) in the sense of folding (compare H3664 (כָּנַס));

H3667.strongs_def: Kenaan, a son a Ham; also the country inhabited by him
H3667.pos: masculine noun, proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H3668.strongs_def: Kenaanah, the name of two Israelites

H3669.strongs_def: a Kenaanite or inhabitant of Kenaan; by implication, a pedlar (the Canaanites standing for their neighbors the Ishmaelites, who conducted mercantile caravans)

H3670.strongs_def: properly, to project laterally, i.e. probably (reflexive) to withdraw

H3671.strongs_def: an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle
H3671.kjv_def: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).
H3671.usage: wing(74x), skirt(14x), borders(2x), corners(2x), ends(2x), feathered(2x), sort(2x), winged(2x)

H3672.derivation: or כִּנֶּרֶתlemma כִּנֶרֶת missing dagesh, corrected to כִּנֶּרֶת; respectively plural and singular feminine from the same as H3658 (כִּנּוֹר); perhaps harp-shaped;
H3672.strongs_def: Kinneroth or Kinnereth, a place in Palestine

H3674.strongs_def: a colleague (as having the same title)

H3676.derivation: apparently a contraction for H3678 (כִּסֵּא), but probably by erroneous transcription for H5251 (נֵס)
H3676.strongs_def: {a flag; also a sail; by implication, a flagstaff; generally a signal; figuratively, a token}

H3677.strongs_def: properly, fulness or the full moon, i.e. its festival

H3678.strongs_def: properly, covered, i.e. a throne (as canopied)

H3679.strongs_def: {a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed; by implication, a Chaldaean (as if so descended); also an astrologer (as if proverbial of that people}

H3680.strongs_def: properly, to plump, i.e. fill up hollows; by implication, to cover (for clothing or secrecy)
H3680.kjv_def: clad self, close, clothe, conceal, cover (self), (flee to) hide, overwhelm. Compare H3780 (כָּשָׂה).
H3680.usage: cover(135x), hide(6x), conceal(4x), covering(2x), overwhelmed(2x), clad(1x), closed(1x), clothed(1x)

H3681.strongs_def: properly, covered, i.e. (as noun) a covering

H3684.strongs_def: properly, fat, i.e. (figuratively) stupid or silly

H3685.strongs_def: any notable constellation; specifically Orion (as if a burly one)

H3688.strongs_def: properly, to be fat, i.e. (figuratively) silly

H3689.strongs_def: properly, fatness, i.e. by implication (literally) the loin (as the seat of the leaf fat) or (generally) the viscera; also (figuratively) silliness or (in a good sense) trust

H3690.strongs_def: in a good sense, trust; in a bad one, silliness

H3694.derivation: feminine plural of passive participle of H3688 (כָּסַל); fattened;

H3695.derivation: a plural probably of foreign derivation;
H3695.strongs_def: Casluchim, a people cognate to the Egyptians

H3696.derivation: from the feminine plural of H3689 (כֶּסֶל) and H8396 (תָּבוֹר); flanks of Tabor;

H3698.strongs_def: spelt (from its bristliness as if just shorn)
